name: Parth Tank
tagline: Building scalable, data-driven web applications with clean engineering and modern AI tools.
bio: I'm a Computer Engineering student (Diploma + B.E.) specializing in full-stack MERN development and AI/ML. I enjoy building real-time web applications with React and Node.js, and developing end-to-end predictive ML pipelines using Python, TensorFlow, and Scikit-learn. I'm passionate about delivering scalable, data-driven solutions through clean engineering and modern AI tools.
